metadata.description: Keel — Claude Code Starter Kit: the enforcement layer (discipline skills, research/verify subagents, memory + safety hooks) as an installable plugin. Clone the repo for the full discipline docs + permissions.

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: The Keel enforcement layer: /keel-handover /keel-distill /keel-phase-review /keel-research /keel-adopt /keel-update /keel-audit /keel-plan /keel-compact skills, researcher + verifier + auditor subagents, and the memory/safety hooks. Pair with the cloned template for the discipline docs + permissions.
